seoTitle: Newcarlbeon vs Newdegate — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Newcarlbeon and Newdegate. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Newcarlbeon and Newdegate.
heading: Newcarlbeon vs Newdegate — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Newcarlbeon, Western Australia and Newdegate, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Newcarlbeon and Newdegate have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Newcarlbeon or Newdegate safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Newcarlbeon has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Newdegate scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Newcarlbeon scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Newdegate scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Newcarlbeon or Newdegate?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Newcarlbeon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
